Appearances:
Plaintiff Gaetani Real Estate is present. Represented by Mr. Gaetani.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jeri Ann Dillon and Patrick Dillon are present.
Attorney Jessica Alexandra representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of NOV-21-2011 remains on calendar.
